response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses "Unauthorized Practice of Law; Multijurisdictional Practice of Law" and is structured around subsections (a)–(d) covering multijurisdictional practice, temporary practice, and safe harbors—not the paralegal-supervision framework, enumerated definitions of "practice of law," or specific state disciplinary claims presented here, which are invented elaborations not found in the real rule text.
response_turn2:
